title: Episode 1
overview: Genjo Sanzo, Son Goku, Cho Hakkai, and Sha Gojyo stop over in a small town during their journey West. Locals share their stories about the loss of humanity exhibited by demons in the area.

title: Episode 2
overview: A huge demonic spirit attacks the town, and the group meets Yaone and Ensui, two demons under Gyōkuman Kōshu's command.
